title: hieracium chrysostylum
intro: Hieracium chrysostylum, also known as Hawkweed, is a flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family and is commonly found in Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Hieracium chrysostylum include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Hieracium chrysostylum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and improve digestion. Herbal preparations of Hieracium chrysostylum can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
